'''''Magic Dragon''''' was the personal [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Miltin Takel]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]] originally named the ''Magic Dragon'' in a segment of his Grand Admirals article that was cut, and was therefore unofficial until being mentioned in [[Barely Tolerable: Alien Henchmen of the Empire]] web article.

"''Magic Dragon''" was a reference to Takel's drug use and the hidden meanings of the song [[Wikipedia:Puff, the Magic Dragon|''Puff, the Magic Dragon'']]. However, the rumors of the song relating to drugs are untrue.
